title: LongTermRefreshLlmOut
description:
Schema for the JSON object returned by `prompts/long_term_summary_prompt.md`. Mirrors `LongTermRefreshLlmOut` and `KnowledgeCandidateLlmOut` in `crates/clawd/src/memory/service.rs`, and is enforced by `long_term_summary_schema_drift` in the same file.

This prompt produces a durable summary plus up to a few conservative structured memory fact candidates. Runtime may still fall back to treating the whole output as plain summary text when the model does not return valid JSON, so the schema primarily guards the structured path rather than making summary refresh brittle.

fact_candidates.description: Optional structured memory fact cards for long-term persistence. Runtime later applies additional conservative validation before writing them.

fact_key.description: Stable machine key for updatable facts, empty when no safe key exists.

fact_value.description: Structured value for the key, empty when the fact is only narrative text.

conflict_group.description: Stable conflict group for facts that should supersede older active facts, empty when no conflict is known.

expires_at_ts.description: Unix timestamp expiry for explicitly temporary facts; null for durable facts.

knowledge_candidates.description: Deprecated compatibility field for older model outputs. Prefer fact_candidates.
